statement: In every magma, Equation 1733 (`x = (y * y) * ((y * y) * z)`) implies Equation 1030 (`x = x * ((x * (y * y)) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0981
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op (op y y) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op (op x (op y y)) z))
